untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (topping pattern identification, downward breakout confirmation, industry correlation screening, and market downturn detection) requires visual/structural pattern analysis not available through the allowed price-action and technical indicators. The signal relies on chart pattern detection and multi-stock correlation that cannot be fully expressed with only OHLCV and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture: (1) downward price movement from recent high using close < prev_high, (2) magnitude of decline (-33% to -32%) using returns < -0.33. Exit uses 20-SMA crossover as reversal signal. However, the core entry condition—identifying a completed topping pattern with structural characteristics—is untranslatable without pattern recognition capability. Industry confirmation and strong market downturn detection also require external data/regime classification beyond allowed indicators.
